content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/app.config.ts", "summary": "This file configures the Angular application by setting up routing and HTTP client module providers.", "rules": [{"name": "Configure Application Providers", "description": "Set up the necessary providers for the Angular application to function properly, including routing and HTTP client services.", "conditions": ["ApplicationConfig object creation"], "actions": ["Provide router configuration using routes from app.routes", "Import HttpClientModule"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/core", "@angular/common/http", "@angular/router"]}
